notes: v0.5.1 — fix Live Render hang + add debug logging. Replaced the 0.05s first-tick UI.start_timer with a direct 0.5s timer (the 0.05s value sometimes never fired under SU 2025/2026's timer scheduler, leaving the user with status "Live Render: ON" and nothing else). Added [GPT Render Live] puts at every stage (start / kick / capture OK or fail / render OK or fail with stack-trace head) so users can pinpoint future hangs from Window → Ruby Console. No UI changes.
